title: verbascum azerbaijanense
intro: Verbascum azerbaijanense is a species of flowering plant in the mullein family (Scrophulariaceae) native to the South Caucasus. It has been found to have medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves containing saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, Verbascum azerbaijanense is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in various formulations to leverage its medicinal properties.
